title: OCI Cross-Compartment Activity Anomaly
description: Identifies users operating across an unusual number of compartments, which may indicate lateral movement or reconnaissance after initial access.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | stats distinctcount('Compartment Name') as compartment_count, count as total_actions by 'Principal Name' | where compartment_count > 5 | sort -compartment_count
notes: Most users operate in 1-3 compartments. Cross-compartment spikes suggest compromised credentials or insider threat.
